title: Relative to bias-free child removals
summary: By Representatives Higgins of Leominster and Meschino of Hull, a petition of Natalie M. Higgins, Joan Meschino and Lindsay N. Sabadosa that the Department of Children and Families be authorized to develop a bias-free case review team to screen proposed emergency child removals. Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities
Hearing scheduled for 07/08/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-1
Accompanied a new draft, see H4599
